name: Central Christian Church
description: Central Christian Church is a place to play pickleball in Fairmont, WV. There is 1 indoor hard court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is private. Players have access to restrooms.

name: East Marion Park
description: Come play pickleball at East Marion Park in Fairmont, WV! There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Hough Park
description: Hough Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mannington, WV. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Mary Lou Retton Park
description: Mary Lou Retton Park is a place to play pickleball in Fairmont, WV. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.
